title: Discrete Mathematics - Combinatory - Euler Phi Function

questions.question:
Consider the Euler’s phi function given by

\[ \phi(n) = n \underset{p/n}{\Pi } \bigg( 1 – \frac{1}{p} \bigg) \]

where \( p \) runs over all the primes dividing \( n \). What is the value of \( \phi(45) \)?



Combinatory: UGC NET CSE | June 2019 | Part 2 | Question: 63
